product_depth.justification: Handles all 4 argument variants plus uninstall with state accumulation. Atomic writes. Dynamic manifest filtering. Matches anchor 4.

functionality.justification: All 7 F-061 verification steps pass. F-063 grep returns zero hits. All contract checks pass. Matches anchor 4.

visual_design.justification: Clear output messages with consistent [OK] prefixes, suite and path information displayed. Matches anchor 4.

code_quality.justification: Clean helper functions, atomic writes, proper argument validation, case statement for input validation. Matches anchor 4.

contract_checks.evidence: install.sh tested with core, sdlc, sales, all -- correct manifests each time
.harness-installed created on first install, updated on subsequent installs
--uninstall sales removes sales and regenerates; --uninstall core exits 1
install.bat mirrors install.sh with equivalent batch subroutines
Output messages show source, project, relpath, suite, and state
grep returns zero hits for Claude Code in generic contexts

non_blocking_issues: install.bat copilot instructions do not filter non-installed suite lines (benign -- paths simply won't match)

feature_evidence.reason: All 7 verification steps pass. State file tracks suites. Manifests dynamic. Uninstall works. Core protected.
reset.md line 22 fixed. Grep audit zero hits in generic contexts.

non_blocking: install.bat copilot filtering is path-rewrite only, not line-removal

internal_consistency.justification: Both scripts follow identical flow pattern. State file format matches spec.

intentionality.justification: Chose atomic writes for state safety. Plain text format as specified. Argument validation with helpful error messages.

craft.justification: Consistent structure, clear section headers, helper functions for reuse.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Users can selectively install suites and manifests are correctly generated for their configuration.
